claims.claim: Fallback shadow texture terms should be weighted by current spectral state instead of treated as equal static options.
claims.evidence_plan: Link to llm.rs fallback_shadow_texture_selector_v1/fallback_dynamic_texture_bias_v1 and targeted fallback texture tests.

claims.claim: High entropy, density gradient, pressure risk, and jitter/weight state should influence whether terms such as viscous-persistence, silted, or lattice-tension rise.
claims.evidence_plan: Link to dynamic texture weighting tests for density_gradient and pressure/porosity language bias.

claims.claim: Fallback model capacity can flatten texture, but entropy-triggered provider/model/sampler changes must not happen silently.
claims.evidence_plan: Link to fallback_pressure_capacity_review_v1 and model-chain capacity tests showing capacity context only, no model switch.
